mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN level = 'INFO' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS info_count, SUM(CASE WHEN level = 'WARN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS warn_count, SUM(CASE WHEN level = 'ERROR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS error_count FROM system_log WHERE create_time >= CURDATE() AND create_time < CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY
